pi_items.source: Task description explicitly asks to save as 'Weekend_Analysis.dva' and verifier checks for it.
Task description explicitly specifies the title and the verifier prompts the VLM to check for it.
Task description specifies 'Weekend' and 'Weekday', and the verifier prompts the VLM to check for these labels.
setup_oracle_analytics.ps1 environment setup script explicitly copies the data file to this location.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an Oracle Analytics Desktop workbook using the sample order lines dataset located at 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx'. The workbook must be saved as 'Weekend_Analysis.dva', contain a visualization titled 'Revenue Share: Weekend vs Weekday', and include a calculated field creating 'Weekend' and 'Weekday' labels from the Order Date.
